title: Densify
html: Stub. The third of the three vault operations (alongside INGEST and EXPLORE) defined in CLAUDE — a retroactive linking pass that re-reads older summaries with full awareness of pages that didn't exist at original ingest time, adding wikilinks where targets now exist.
